// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (g), round-11 caller
// resolution: the bd wrapper is reached through a NESTED selector
// (o.in.driveBD — the receiver is itself a selector, not a bare
// ident) and through a METHOD VALUE (run := d.driveBD). Once the
// wrapper spawn is classified caller-audited, NEITHER caller may
// escape the caller-audited fixed point.
package fixture

import (
	"os/exec"
)

type innerDriver struct{}

func (d *innerDriver) driveBD(args ...string) ([]byte, error) {
	return exec.Command("bd", args...).Output()
}

type outerHolder struct {
	in *innerDriver
}

func nestedSelectorCaller(o *outerHolder, specID string) ([]byte, error) {
	return o.in.driveBD("show", specID)
}

func methodValueCaller(d *innerDriver, beadID string) ([]byte, error) {
	run := d.driveBD
	return run("update", beadID, "--claim")
}
